message:
test(http/h2): improve test coverage for error codes and bounds

Enhances HTTP/2 frame and settings tests with more precise assertions:

frame.rs:
- Add test for padded DATA frame with empty payload rejection
- Verifies ProtocolError is returned when PADDED flag is set but no
  padding length byte is present (payload too short)

settings.rs:
- Improve error code verification in existing tests:
  - Invalid INITIAL_WINDOW_SIZE now asserts FlowControlError code
  - Invalid MAX_FRAME_SIZE now asserts ProtocolError code
- Add bounds test for MAX_FRAME_SIZE valid range:
  - Minimum (16384) and maximum (16777215) values accepted

These tests ensure the HTTP/2 implementation returns the correct error
codes as specified in RFC 7540, which is important for protocol
compliance and interoperability with other HTTP/2 implementations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
